win_condition: Team wins immediately by causing opposing team to gain 2 miscommunication tokens or by collecting 2 interception tokens first.
tiebreaker: If both conditions trigger in same round, team with fewer miscommunication tokens wins; if still tied, shared victory.

categories.label: Interception Tokens
categories.description: Primary progress toward victory: first team to 2 interception tokens wins.

categories.label: Opponent Miscommunication Tokens Caused
categories.description: Track how many miscommunication tokens opponent has (2 also ends game in your favor).

categories.label: Own Miscommunication Tokens (Penalty)
categories.description: Penalty tracker for your team errors; reaching 2 loses game.
